problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix — specifically Carbon nanotube alignment — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.
